name: Evil Vendor
phrases: Final sale... of your life.
You owe me more than just coin, friend.
No refunds. No returns. No hope.
SURPRISE! Did you think this would be fair?
Trust was always a mistake. Yours, anyway.
All sales final, and so are you.
Discount? Sure! I'll take a discount from your spine!
I wear a counterfeit smile just for you.
Margins are tight... no, your throat is.
Lay-away your life? I'll collect immediately.
I sell pain too—very competitive prices.
The house always wins, and you're the house's meal.
You should've haggled better... too late now.
Inflation hurts? Not as much as this will.
Press V to DIE. Go on, try it.
Guarantee void... your warranty on breathing is void.
Sold! Your debt, that is. To me.
Cha-CHING! That's the sound of your suffering paying dividends.
*rubs a coin in the dirt*
*flips a coin into your eye*
Don't come back now, you won't survive the second visit.
this dagger needs sharpening... and you'll provide the whetstone
Farewell, fool. Give my regards to the abyss.
Blood price rising? So is your debt, every second.
this shop was better before the regulations
Your debt compounds faster than you can beg.
Goodbye is overpriced, but you don't have the currency anyway.
Better luck next life, if I let you have one.
that customer last week paid in EYES
Press V to DIE
